Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Rosegold]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Rosegold is a location that can be reached from the current area.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Rosegold is the place where Eithan was born.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Rosegold is a destination reachable via a labyrinth branch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Rosegold is a continent not facing invasion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Rosegold contains a museum.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — The Monarch of House Shen was securing prizes in Rosegold.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Rosegold is one of the five land masses projected by the Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Rosegold is a continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Rosegold is a populated continent.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
